title: Amel Bakli

Ominaz appeared in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''; while no specific date for the events in the game is given, it is set between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], occurring in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], and the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], which occurred in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. Additionally, ''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]'', which states that both Bakli and Ominaz were killed, is set in the same time frame. As Bakli is stated to be dead before the Battle of Hoth, Bakli must have died in the indicated three year time frame.</ref> [[Caprioril]]<ref name="SWS">''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]''</ref>

'''Amel Bakli''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] who ruled over the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] of [[Caprioril]], a normally tranquil [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. The governor was targeted by an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]], who reasoned that the best way to ensure its target's [[Death/Legends|death]] was to kill all 20,000 spectators at a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] race Bakli was attending.<ref name="SWS" /> The event became known as the [[Caprioril Massacre]],<ref name="ASS1" /> and also claimed the life of swoop racer [[Ignar Ominaz]].<ref name="SWS" />
